title: Glow Ink Sack Recipe
description: Now craft your own glow ink sack
body:
🦑 Glow Ink Sac Recipe Datapack  
Craft luminous writing—no glow squid required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for Glow Ink Sacs, giving players a renewable way to access glowing signs and item frames.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Glowstone Dust + 1 Ink Sac  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with squid drops and light-based crafting  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.17+
